name: mantle-dna
description: AI-powered wallet DNA analysis on Mantle Network

scripts.compile: cd blockchain && npm install && npx hardhat compile
scripts.test: cd blockchain && npm install && npx hardhat test
scripts.deploy:testnet: cd blockchain && npm install && npx hardhat run scripts/deploy.js --network mantleTestnet
scripts.deploy:mainnet: cd blockchain && npm install && npx hardhat run scripts/deploy.js --network mantle
scripts.dev: cd frontend && npm install && npm run dev
